summary: Iteration 15 - Company Page Redesign & Settings Page Fixes. All features verified: Settings page shows 8 modern cards with correct navigation paths, Company page has modern card-based layout with empty state, Add Company modal works correctly, dark mode theming verified for both pages, CompanySaga error handling uses optional chaining.

minor.issue: Frontend configured to use dynopay.com as NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL causing CORS errors in preview environment. This is a configuration issue, not a bug in the implementation.

critical_code_review_comments: Company page (pages/company.tsx): Modern card-based layout with empty state, Add Company button, company cards with Manage button - VERIFIED
Settings page (pages/settings/index.tsx): 8 cards in 3-column grid with correct navigation paths - VERIFIED
CompanySaga error handling: All 5 catch blocks use optional chaining (e?.response?.data?.message) - VERIFIED
Dark mode theming: Both pages properly themed in dark mode - VERIFIED

test_credentials.note: Token injection used for authentication due to OTP-gated login

context_for_next_testing_agent: Company page and Settings page redesign complete. All 8 settings cards navigate correctly: Company Profile→/company, Wallet Addresses→/wallet, Payment Settings→/company?section=payment, Webhook Configuration→/company?section=webhook, API Keys→/developer-keys, Profile & Security→/profile, Notifications→/notifications, My Account→/referrals. Company page shows empty state with 'No companies yet' message due to CORS blocking API calls in preview. Add Company modal opens with form fields (Company Name, Email, Mobile, Website, Brand Logo). Dark mode works correctly on both pages.

settings_page_redesign.details: 8 cards in 3-column grid layout with colored icons, titles, descriptions, and correct navigation paths

company_page_redesign.details: Modern card-based layout with empty state showing business icon, 'No companies yet' message, description, and Add Company button

add_company_modal.details: Modal opens with form fields: Company Name, Email, Mobile (MuiTelInput), Website, Brand Logo upload, Cancel and Add Company buttons

dark_mode_theming.details: Both pages properly themed in dark mode with readable text, colored icons, and subtle borders

company_saga_error_handling.details: All 5 catch blocks use optional chaining (e?.response?.data?.message) to prevent crashes on network errors
